title: minuartia rubra subsp. cymifera
intro: Minuartia rubra subsp. cymifera, also known as the Alpine Pink or Mountain Pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Minuartia rubra subsp. cymifera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin conditions.
